channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-20171] conf-sanity test_57a: 'import is not in FULL state'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sbansal <sbansal@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e73b54c6-1a1e-41ec-b4d7-a72f58a80ac6

test_57a failed with the following error:
 
 import is not in FULL state
Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/898 - 5.14.0-570.42.2.el9_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es6_0/898 - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_lustre.ddn17.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

trevis-156vm76: Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//rpc..*.1768335787.log
trevis-156vm76: CMD: trevis-156vm76.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-156vm77,trevis-156vm78,trevis-156vm79 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//rpc..debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1768335787.log;
trevis-156vm76: dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//rpc..dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1768335787.log
pdsh@trevis-156vm76: trevis-156vm76: ssh exited with exit code 1
conf-sanity test_57b: @@@@@@ FAIL: import is not in FULL state
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6870:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:8650:wait_clients_import_state()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:142:start_mds()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:150:start_mgsmds()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:4725:test_57b()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7227:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7288:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7111:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh:4729:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//conf-sanity.test_57b.*.1768335792.log
CMD: trevis-156vm76.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-156vm77,trevis-156vm78,trevis-156vm79 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//conf-sanity.test_57b.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1768335792.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-1/2026-01-13/lustre-b_es6_0_full-part-3_898_67_687e49c9-f1e7-4a2f-b796-6cd896f04de4//conf-sanity.test_57b.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1768335792.log

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_57a - import is not in FULL state
item.summary: conf-sanity test_57a: 'import is not in FULL state'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Nikos Papakonstantinou <npapakonstantinou@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65436
Subject: LU-20171 tests: Do not wait for FULL state in conf-sanity/57a
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 832938513716205ade6c7faaaf955cc71f3faf4f

If I understand the test case correctly, the test is specifically testing failnode registration failures. The OSTs are configured with failover NID and this should cause a failure in their registration on MGS. But the clients are configured to wait for FULL state which cannot be achieved because of failures in OST nodes.

I think the proper way to fix this issue is not enforce the clients to wait for FULL state and just skip them.
